title: calocephalus skeatsianus
intro: Calocephalus skeatsianus, also known as Skeat's calocephalus, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Calocephalus skeatsianus include reducing inflammation and preventing the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it beneficial for wound healing and relieving pain. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and boosting the immune system.
